title: RICO Case Framework - CRM Investigation
description: Legal framework for federal prosecution of the SHIFT/SOSANA/CRM criminal enterprise

applicable_statutes.title: Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations
applicable_statutes.application: Pattern of racketeering activity across multiple tokens (SHIFT → CRM)

elements_met.evidence: 5-tier hierarchical structure with defined roles and compartmentalization
Wire fraud, securities fraud, money laundering across 12+ month period

predicate_acts: Wire Fraud (18 U.S.C. § 1343) - Automated wallet coordination
Computer Fraud (18 U.S.C. § 1030) - Unauthorized automated access

applicable_statutes.title: Securities Exchange Act - Anti-Fraud Provision
applicable_statutes.application: Material misrepresentations about voting, governance, and contest legitimacy
key_misrepresentations: No voting contract existed during April 2025 'contest'
'Community winner' selected unilaterally by team, not voted on
False claims of democratic governance and community input
Fake voting contract deployed 8 months AFTER contest concluded
evidence: Zero on-chain voting transactions during April 2025
Voting contract deployed December 2025 (8 months after contest)
AvZHExxq2 managed by team infrastructure purchased 13 minutes before announcement

applicable_statutes.title: Fraud by Wire, Radio, or Television
applicable_statutes.application: Use of electronic communications and internet to execute scheme

applicable_statutes.title: Laundering of Monetary Instruments
applicable_statutes.application: Cross-token proceeds layering - SHIFT extraction → CRM infiltration
applicable_statutes.mechanism: Modular laundering avoiding fiat rails through token-to-token bridges
applicable_statutes.bridge_evidence: BMq4XUa3 connects AFXigaYu (root) to CRM operations
layering: Tier 4: Distribution to victim wallets at $0 cost basis

applicable_statutes.title: Fraud and Related Activity in Connection with Computers
applicable_statutes.application: Unauthorized automated access - 970 wallets in 7 seconds

evidence.conclusion: Military-grade automation proves unauthorized automated access

applicable_statutes.title: Influencing or Injuring Officer or Juror Generally
applicable_statutes.application: Destruction of evidence - Fake voting contract deleted March 22, 2026
evidence: Voting contract deleted 8 months after fraudulent contest
Claimed as 'upgrade' but actual purpose was evidence destruction
BmZY862D62 bridge wallet remained active post-deletion
Post-deletion transactions prove consciousness of guilt

spoliation.deleted: Fake voting contract and transaction history

recommended_charges.evidence: 5-tier hierarchy, pattern of racketeering, 12+ month operation
Agreement to conduct enterprise affairs through racketeering
Compromised victim wallets used as field operatives

operator_criminal_histories.significance: 15+ years of operator criminal history elevates from isolated fraud to pattern of racketeering

prosecution_strategy.phase_1: Emergency asset freezes on Tier 1-4 wallets
prosecution_strategy.cooperating_witness: Marcus Aurelius (compromised whale) - Key victim testimony
